evidence: evidence: PR title: fix data race for chunk resource channel in index merge join.
evidence: diff avoids closing joinChkResourceCh and adds ctx.Done() select when receiving chunks to prevent channel/data race issues (executor/index_lookup_merge_join.go).
files: executor/index_lookup_merge_join.go
evidence: PR title: stabilize test TestParallelDDLBeforeRunDDLJob.
evidence: adds time.Sleep(100ms) with comment to avoid a loop waiting on atomic sessionCnt becoming true forever (ddl/db_change_test.go).
files: ddl/db_change_test.go
evidence: PR body: leak tests are not stable because RPCClient routes requests into a closed unistore.
evidence: diff adds an atomic closed flag and returns context.Canceled when closed to break Backoff and avoid stuck goroutines (store/mockstore/unistore/rpc.go).
files: store/mockstore/unistore/rpc.go
evidence: PR title: make TestDispatchClientProtocol41 stable.
evidence: uses a generated port instead of a fixed one and defers server.Close() to avoid port conflicts/leaks (server/conn_test.go).
files: server/conn_test.go
evidence: PR title: make TestSortInDisk more stable.

evidence: moves disk-spill related tests into a SerialSuites suite with cleanup, enables failpoints to force deterministic spill, and makes ActionSpill creation idempotent (executor/*_test.go, util/chunk/row_container.go).
files: executor/executor_test.go, executor/sort_test.go, executor/merge_join_test.go, util/chunk/row_container.go
evidence: PR body: mixed DDLs on unistore can block 2*lease (context deadline exceeded) due to MockSchemaSyncer behavior.
evidence: MockSchemaSyncer.OwnerCheckAllVersions uses ver>=latestVer instead of ver==latestVer to avoid unnecessary blocking (ddl/mock.go).
files: ddl/mock.go
evidence: PR title: make TestForServersInfo stable.
evidence: switches to infosync.GetServerInfo() instead of iterating GetAllServerInfo(), avoiding nondeterministic server-list behavior in test (executor/infoschema_reader_test.go).
files: executor/infoschema_reader_test.go
evidence: PR title: make TestSlowQuerySensitiveQuery stable.
evidence: introduces a serial suite and moves TestSlowQuerySensitiveQuery into it to avoid interference from global config changes (executor/executor_test.go).
files: executor/executor_test.go
evidence: PR title: try to make TestSplitRegion stable.
evidence: moves TestSplitRegion into the serial split-table suite (testSplitTable) to avoid parallel interference (executor/executor_test.go).
files: executor/executor_test.go
evidence: PR title: stablize test case prewrite secondaries.
evidence: adds testing knob noFallBack to avoid async-commit fallback path in test, and adjusts assertions/backoff setup to reduce races (store/tikv/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/prewrite.go).
files: store/tikv/2pc.go, store/tikv/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/prewrite.go
evidence: PR title: make TestAllServerInfo stable.
evidence: splits HTTP handler tests into normal and SerialSuites suites and runs TestAllServerInfo serially to avoid interference (server/http_handler_test.go).
files: server/http_handler_test.go
